title: Marriage Italian Style
writer: Eduardo De Filippo, Renato Castellani, Tonino Guerra
actors: Sophia Loren, Marcello Mastroianni, Aldo Puglisi
plot: Wealthy businessman Domenico and penniless prostitute Filumena share a large part of their lives in post-WWII Italy.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 7 wins & 10 nominations total
